use_cases: Call-to-action button in futuristic SaaS dashboards with HUD aesthetic
Interactive trigger in developer tooling interfaces with glow feedback
Primary action button in fintech applications with theme-aware styling
Feature activation button in gaming-style overlays with smooth animations
ai_summary: A futuristic heads-up display styled button component featuring theme-aware colors, glow effects, and smooth Framer Motion animations. Supports dark/light mode with green primary and slate secondary variants, reduced motion preferences, and multiple sizes. Perfect for modern SaaS dashboards and developer tools requiring a sleek, tech-forward button aesthetic.
